messages.title: TideX
messages.subtitle: Ngā tai ā-tūturu me ngā matapae mō ngā takutai katoa o te ao
messages.mapHint: Pāwhiria te mahere hei kōwhiri i tētahi takutai. Ka whakaaturia ngā takutai tata ki raro.
messages.currentWind: Te pupuhi hau i taua wā
messages.dailyHigh: Te tai pari o te rā
messages.dailyLow: Te tai timu o te rā
messages.disclaimer: Hei tohutoro whakamahere anake. Kaua e whakamahia hei pūtake kotahi mō te whakatere, mō te haumaru rānei.
messages.locating: E kimi ana i tō wāhi...
messages.locationDenied: Kua whakakāhoretia te urunga wāhi. Ka taea tonu te kōwhiri i te mahere.
messages.locationError: Kāore i taea te kimi i te wāhi. Tīpakohia ki te mahere.
messages.locationUnsupported: Kāore tō pūtirotiro e tautoko i te geolocation.
messages.loading: E uta ana i ngā raraunga tai...
messages.fetchError: Kāore e taea te uta raraunga mō tēnei wāhi ināianei.
messages.noneBeaches: Kāore i kitea he takutai whai ingoa i te tata.
messages.fallbackNotice: Kei te whakamahia te matapae taurite nā te mea kāore he raupapa tika mō tēnei rā.
